meta.doc: Hermes 2.0 VISUAL UI/UX plan — machine-readable surface -> concepts + libs map
meta.master_principle: everything VISUAL, no tables, no walls of text, glance-able, dive-in feel

constraints.cdn: zero CDN, all libs vendored local hash-pinned

meta.react_recommendation: Stay vanilla for shell + Surfaces 1,2,4. All wow libs are framework-agnostic. React only as optional islands for heavy Dossier scrollytelling state. React-coupled libs (visx, Nivo, Tremor) are reference-only.

color_semantics_oklch.consolidated: cool muted blue/teal (has site + marketing, already taken)
color_semantics_oklch.intensity_ramp: perceptually-uniform OKLCH sequential (culori + d3-scale) so heatmap never lies
color_semantics_oklch.encoding_law: solid=measured, translucent=projected; count-up only on real numbers

surfaces.name: Sweep Map
surfaces.purpose: explore territory, spot opportunities, paint swept vs unexplored
concepts: Self-hosted dark OKLCH PMTiles basemap (single Brazil/MT .pmtiles, no tile server, no API key)
deck.gl GPU overlay: GeoJsonLayer choropleth, H3HexagonLayer swept hexes, HeatmapLayer density, ScatterplotLayer pulsing dots
MANY filters that RECOLOR via deck.gl updateTriggers on getFillColor (one GPU frame, zero refetch) + live counter
H3 hexbin swept-vs-unexplored sweep metaphor, resolution scales with zoom
Fog-of-war paint: dark overlay punched out where swept + swept-vs-total progress ring
Cinematic semantic drill-down country->state->city, flyTo(curve:1.42), globe->Mercator morph ~z12, focus-dim
Click-to-sweep: Terra Draw lasso -> Turf.js encloses H3 cells -> animated wipe + shimmer
Region modal: PostGIS aggregate -> count-up donut gauges (total vs opportunities vs niche) + geolocation + handoff CTA
Legend that doubles as a filter; realtime follow-cursor tooltip per zoom tier
PostGIS + h3-pg spatial brain: pre-aggregated filtered GeoJSON, 'missing a service' reverse-filter in SQL

surfaces.name: Lead Conveyor
surfaces.purpose: scan 50 leads in seconds, decide, dispatch actions
concepts: Kinetic cards not tables: name, score ring, niche icon, size, revenue sparkline, social dots (lit/dim), ads-posts micro-bar
Conveyor Kanban states: found -> audited -> ready-to-contact -> contacted, drag to restate, auto-advance micro-animation
Reverse-filter businesses MISSING a service (negative-space gold), recolors conveyor + map, live count badge
Max filters as chips that re-tint and FLIP-animate cards into new rank (shared lens with map)

Per-card hover action row (icon buttons): dossier, mark-contacted, send-to-Geronimo, re-audit, see-audit-failures, compare-competitors, adversarial-report, market-dominance-estimate, SEO-SEM-strategies
Score band micro-bar / chip for high-density rows, glow-by-band so hottest lead is brightest
Region->conveyor handoff from Surface 1

surfaces.name: Dossier
surfaces.purpose: glance-to-decide verdict, honest revenue projection, conversion ammo to close
concepts: BLUF verdict header (inverted pyramid): one hero conclusion + status color + 0-100 score ring before any evidence
Scrollytelling 4 acts (who/missing/cost/what-we-do) with pinned hero visual that mutates per scroll step
Dual-arc potential-gap ring (current vs potential, gap = the pitch, no ranges, one committed number)
Range bullet bar / scenario fan: solid=measured translucent=projected, conservative-likely-optimistic band
Waterfall of upside levers color-keyed to delivering project (Vuecra=site, Geronimo=ads/SEO), toggle lever -> live total
Stellar chart (radial spears not lying radar) client vs dominant competitor
Reverse-gap matrix heatmap (what-they-have-you-dont)
Market-dominance Voronoi treemap (FoamTree) sized by share
Adversarial 2-axis competitor plot with gap vectors -> click vector -> recommended offer
Confidence encoding: solid=high, hatched=inferred, faint=guessed

surfaces.name: Command Center
surfaces.purpose: ONLY Hermes actions + realtime monitoring + cross-project triggers, fully visual
concepts: Living nervous-system WebGL agent graph: nodes=Hermes core+40+ agents+Vuecra+Geronimo, edges=triggers, animated particles=work in flight, pulse/halo/red=status
Cross-project triggers drawn as edges firing: Hermes->Vuecra build-site, Hermes->Geronimo run-marketing/software-strategy
Click-node radial action menu + agent detail; click-edge trigger payload/result; trigger any action from the node
Realtime via existing daemon.{subsystem_status,log_event,decision} WS broadcasts -> patch pulses/particles/halos, transition-only
Instrument-cluster pure-CSS needle gauges for 40+ agent health, swing in realtime off WS (cockpit)
deck.gl ArcLayer overlay on map: closed leads fire glowing arcs to delivering project, camera-synced
Monitor cross-project done vs in-progress as node halos; filter by subsystem/status dims subgraphs
Smooth status recolor + entrance transitions (Motion One, restrained)

agent_viz_ideas: Nervous-system WebGL graph (primary): particles=work, pulse=status, halo=done (Sigma.js)
Cockpit gauge wall: pure-CSS needle gauges per agent, vital signs off WS
Swimlane heartbeat strip: per-agent ECG pulse line, spike=run, red spike=error
Particle-flow river: each particle a lead moving discover->enrich->qualify->handoff, width=throughput
Hex-grid agent board: each agent a hex tile (reuse H3 language), fill=load
Live timeline ticker: last N decisions as flowing chips, color=subsystem
3D depth stack: subsystems on parallax CSS-3D layers, tilt on mouse
Trigger-pulse map overlay: cross-project triggers as deck.gl arcs on geography
Mini-graph badges on conveyor cards: which agents touched this lead
Error-spotlight mode: filter to error/stuck nodes, rest dims to fog
action_dispatch_ux: Hover action row on cards (icon buttons + tooltips)
Radial/pie menu on Command Center nodes
Drag-to-trigger: drag lead card onto project node to fire handoff
Command palette (Cmd+K) fuzzy-search any action across surfaces
Confirm-by-gesture (slide/hold) for destructive + cross-project (matches Brain requires_confirm)
Optimistic visual feedback before WS confirm
Reuse window.hermesToast (F.2.4) for confirms, window.skeleton for loading
wow_moments: Fog-of-war sweep paint: lasso gray region, fog dissolves radial wipe + shimmer, hexes bloom, progress ring grows
GPU recolor in one frame: drag filter, whole map recolors <16ms, live counter ticks matches
Cinematic country->state->city dive: flyTo(curve:1.42) + globe->Mercator morph + cursor tooltip all the way down
Dual-arc gap ring: empty space between current and potential IS the pitch, gap opens on reveal, no ranges
Living nervous-system agent graph: 40+ WebGL nodes, cross-project trigger particle pulses, status as pulse/halo/red
Reverse-gap one-click pitch generator: 'missing a service' recolors to only exploitable gaps
One OKLCH color language across all 4 surfaces: learn 'coral=money' once
solid=measured / translucent=projected honesty law + count-up only on real numbers

libs.name: MapLibre GL JS
libs.role: base WebGL vector map, flyTo, feature-state recolor, zoom-gated layers

libs.name: Protomaps / PMTiles
libs.role: single .pmtiles basemap off Contabo nginx, no tile server, OKLCH dark restyle

libs.name: deck.gl v9 + @deck.gl/mapbox
libs.role: GPU GeoJson/H3Hexagon/Heatmap/Scatterplot/Arc layers, updateTriggers instant recolor, DataFilterExtension live counts

libs.name: Uber H3 / h3-js
libs.role: hexagonal hierarchical sweep grid client-side, zoom-tiered resolution

libs.name: h3-pg
libs.role: H3 in PostGIS, integer-join density aggregation server-side

libs.name: PostGIS
libs.role: spatial brain on Contabo, pre-aggregated filtered GeoJSON + missing-a-service reverse-filter in SQL

libs.name: Terra Draw + maplibre-gl-terradraw
libs.role: click/drag/freehand sweep-area selection, replaces mapbox-gl-draw

libs.name: Turf.js
libs.role: point-in-polygon/contains to compute hexes & businesses inside a drawn sweep zone

libs.name: IBGE / geobr / geodata-br / br-atlas
libs.role: official Brazil state + municipality boundary GeoJSON/TopoJSON

libs.name: mapshaper
libs.role: build-time simplify/quantize IBGE boundaries into per-zoom LOD tiers

libs.name: culori
libs.role: OKLCH perceptually-uniform ramps + colorblind-safe lightness separation

libs.name: d3-scale + d3-scale-chromatic
libs.role: quantize opportunity scores into OKLCH bins, legend thresholds

libs.name: D3.js (d3-shape/d3-scale/d3-geo modules)
libs.role: vanilla arc/gauge path math, sparklines, bespoke transitions, import submodules only

libs.name: d3-force
libs.role: fallback non-WebGL agent-graph layout

libs.name: Pure CSS (conic-gradient + Houdini @property + OKLCH)
libs.role: all score rings/needle gauges, zero bundle, native interpolation

libs.name: Apache ECharts 6
libs.role: vanilla-first one-lib: stellar/radar/treemap/heatmap/bullet/gauge/sankey

libs.name: ApexCharts
libs.role: range-bar/range-area/bullet out of the box for honest current-vs-potential ranges

libs.name: FoamTree (Carrot Search)
libs.role: organic Voronoi treemap for market-dominance viz

libs.name: Sigma.js
libs.role: WebGL node-link agent graph, 40+ nodes at 60fps, animated edges, status pulses

libs.name: graphology
libs.role: graph data model + layouts for the agent graph

libs.name: GSAP + ScrollTrigger
libs.role: scrollytelling dossier pinned-visual morph; vendor one file, isolate per no-gsap-outside ESLint rule

libs.name: Motion One
libs.role: ~5KB WAAPI vanilla: FLIP reflow, card flips, ring count-ups, modal springs, status recolor

libs.name: SortableJS
libs.role: drag cards between conveyor Kanban state columns

libs.name: inline SVG sparkline
libs.role: ~80x24px no-axis trend charts inside cards, one path-builder function, no lib

libs.name: kepler.gl (optional analyst lab)
libs.role: OPTIONAL side analyst lab only (React/UMD), not the daily dashboard

libs.name: visx (REFERENCE ONLY)
libs.role: React-coupled; mine arc/gauge/sparkline math, do not import into vanilla

libs.name: Nivo (REFERENCE ONLY)
libs.role: React-only design reference for premium radial/heat looks

libs.name: Tremor (REFERENCE ONLY)
libs.role: React+Tailwind; skip unless stack moves to React

build_phases.name: Foundation
build_phases.deliver: vendor libs local, Brazil/MT .pmtiles on Contabo, OKLCH map style, PostGIS+h3-pg schema, GeoJSON REST endpoint

build_phases.name: Sweep mechanics
build_phases.deliver: Terra Draw lasso, fog-of-war paint, progress ring, filters-recolor+live counter, reverse-filter SQL

build_phases.name: Command Center
build_phases.deps: daemon.* WS + handoff layer (Geronimo NATS, Vuecra HI1/HI2 REST)
build_phases.deliver: Sigma.js graph+WS pulse/particles+radial actions+cockpit gauges+trigger arcs

build_phases.name: Polish & unify
build_phases.deliver: shared-element transitions, Cmd+K palette, reduced-motion pass, WCAG AA (axe-core local), perf budgets

open_decisions: Navigation: radial/dock morph-switcher vs persistent rail vs Cmd+K-first (rec: dock morph + Cmd+K)
Agent-view default: nervous-system graph vs cockpit gauges vs constellation (rec: graph + gauge toggle)
Dossier framework: vanilla+GSAP (rec) vs isolated React island for heavy scrollytelling state
Basemap hosting: Contabo nginx static .pmtiles (rec) vs Cloudflare R2 zero-egress
kepler.gl analyst lab: include as side tool or skip for one cohesive brand surface
Honest-ranges default: always-range vs single committed number + per-client toggle (rec: single + toggle)
Map data scale at launch: Cuiaba-only (rec, smallest/fastest) vs full-MT vs full-Brazil
Cross-project trigger confirm: slide-to-confirm gesture vs explicit modal (per Brain requires_confirm)
